texto: To honor and celebrate; or to balance and rectify, drawing what you want or need into your life. A third mode is less personal, involving a desire to know more deeply, involving a desire to know more deeply, to grow in knowledge and understanding of the cards--breathing in the wisdom of the tarot for its own sake and to learn more about life and the human condition.
explicacao: Citação de Cait Johnson sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “To honor and celebrate; or to balance and rectify, drawing what you want or need into your life. …” articula sabedoria, learning, tarot em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como tarot.
